# Top 50 WAF documents needing alignment work

Ranked by how much work is needed to align with WAF documentation standards — documents at the top need the most improvement.

**Generated:** 2026-03-31
**Documents scanned:** 119 (107 non-index)

**Scoring factors:** Starts at 100, subtracts for: missing Why section (-15), few H2 headings (-10), no/few resource links (-10 to -20), thin word count (-5 to -20), missing description (-5 to -10), missing Next steps (-5), vague pronouns (-5), missing bold challenge pattern (-5). Bonus for proper Why section pattern (+5).

## Score interpretation

| Score range | Status | Action |
|---|---|---|
| 90-100 | ✅ Well aligned | Minor polish only |
| 75-89 | ⚠️ Needs attention | Fix specific issues |
| 50-74 | ❌ Significant gaps | Major revision needed |
| < 50 | 🔴 Critical | Rewrite or restructure |

## How to use this list

1. **Start from the top.** Documents with the lowest scores have the most structural issues.
2. **Run `/publish-gate` on critical docs first.** Confirms the specific blocking issues.
3. **Use the issue column to pick the right skill:**
   - Missing Why section → manual writing
   - No/few resource links → `/add-resources`
   - Thin word count → `/gap-analysis` to identify what to add
   - Missing Next steps → manual writing
   - Vague pronouns → `/check-structure --fix`
